name: Just Another Tome Among So Many: Last Leaves of a Librarian
author: Beldrim Bessart of Baldur's Gate
description:
Just Another Tome Among So Many: Last Leaves of a Librarian — A chronicle preserved in northern and coastal scriptoria — dates, names, and the sort of detail merchants pretend not to need. Beldrim Bessart of Baldur's Gate is credited in library catalogues; the work is dated to unknown.

Later hands added marginal dates and crossed out names; historians still argue which revisions were propaganda.
